{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322200331337AD6035E5CDD6343DD"}"},"total":16},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617159662056440601","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔很好，交代的很清楚，故事线清晰，目标明确，主角本来已经安排好了，但现在似乎出了点小差错？不过有点意外就让人更期待下面剧情了。目前看到最新的40多章，目前文野的各位人设挺贴切的，主角马甲扮演的挺投入，内心想法也变成马甲本人亲自来到文野世界，看得更有意思了，刚开始我还疑惑了下，看了作者解释明白了，各马甲人设写得很到位，作者应该有认真研究过。作者作为学生很忙，现在还在坚持写也是很有毅力了。加油，写得很棒，也祝作者学业有成，万事顺利[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773510729,"group_id":"7600063596621483070","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢故事的闲人，走走看看打发时间٩(˃̶͈̀௰˂̶͈́)و
和平看书，极少讨厌一个角色，和谐看待","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8SGQ0jpUG9oUIjwfbQMVg7l/s2P7Rs/UrSs0ybQ6D7q","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/42c6ad5a476a45a499e2bdf7017bcdbf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701170&x-signature=mqa9t%2BsFB0Ca5hu%2Bl%2BIWT3Mea9o%3D","user_id":"1005413882145456","user_name":"三月的蓝色幻影"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1005413882145456","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":3,"fan_ranklist_title":"殿堂粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600063596621483070","book_info":{"abstract":"【扮演+无cp+米哈游震撼+马甲+开桂+爽文】
【战力默认主角最强，米哈游角色会大大加强】
沐霖意外死亡后，穿越到了综漫世界，看着无时无刻不在打架的横滨、到处都是不可名状的咒灵的涩谷、以及众多的动漫角色，她陷入了沉思。
看着手中的马甲扮演系统，沐霖勾唇一笑，不如就让这里变得更加混乱一些吧！
于是在某只人虎即将要饱餐一顿（吃茶泡饭）时，一个如月般洁净的鸽子出现，并表示自己快要低血糖了。
在五条悟和夏油杰正要开始任务时，一个美丽的鹿人女子出现，开口就问:“有谁见到我家库塔尔了吗？”
沐霖:没错，这些都是我！
沐霖本以为这些只是自己无聊生活中的小插曲时，没想到深渊竟然出现了，既然如此，那便只好展示米哈游震撼了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/eba823a65f44721a907ce0a761bb67c0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"钱古是个嗑学家","author_id":"","book_id":"7600063596621483070","book_name":"综漫从扮演哥伦比娅开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8c8e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600064484471734846","read_count":"16292","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"98294"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"47","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,异世穿越,系统,二次元,综漫,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eba823a65f44721a907ce0a761bb67c0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365011&x-signature=8%2FXZBQNUGrW5OoYljopI6sL%2FVCw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98102226668","extra":{"comme
